title: The Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1975 (09.06.1975)
text: REGISTERED No. D-(D)—72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 152] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, JUNE 9, 1975/JYAISTHA 19, 1897 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th June 1975 G.S.R. 325(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Amendment) Rules, 1975. (a) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Schedule I to the Passports Rules, 1967,— (1) for Serial No. 7 and the entries relating thereto, the following Serial No. shall be substituted, namely :— "7(a) Regional Passport Officer, Madras (Regional The States of Tamil Nadu, Andhra Passport and Emigration Office, Madras) Pradesh and Karnataka and the Union Territory of Pondicherry. (b) Assistant Passport Officer, Madras (Re- Do. gional Passport and Emigration Office, Madras) (c) Public Relations Officer, Madras (Re- Do. gional Passport and Emigration Office, Madras) (2) Serial Nos. 8, 9 and 10 shall be re-numbered as Serial Nos. 9, 10 and 11 thereof respectively, and before Serial No, 9 so re-numbered, the following Serial No. shall be inserted, namely:— "8(a) Regional Passport Officer, Ernakulam The State of Kerala and the Union (Regional Passport and Emigration Office, Territory of Lakshadweep Ernakulam) (1275) -- 1 of 2 -- 1276 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—Sue. 3(i)] (o) Assistant Passport Officer, Kmakulam The State of Kerala tnd the Union (Regional Passport and Emigration Territory of Lakshadwecp. Office, Ernakulam) (c) Public Relations Officer, Ernakulam Do. (Regional Passport ami Emigration Office, Ernakulam) [No. VI/401/22/75] V. C. T RIVEDI, Secy. PRINTED BY THE GENERAL MANAGES, GOVERNMENT OF INDIA PRESS, MINTO ROAD, NEW DELHI AND PUBLISHED BY THE CONTROLLER OF PUBLICATIONS, DELHI, 1975 -- 2 of 2 --
